description_long: This is a simple, utilitarian fence panel composed of vertical greenish slats evenly spaced and supported by two horizontal brown rails on the back. The vertical slats are rectangular and flat, with their tops forming a mostly straight line but with slight height variation. The supporting posts on either side are thicker and brown, providing structural stability. The fence has no visible decorative elements or embellishments, focusing on function over form. The materials appear to be painted or coated wood or composite, giving a matte, hard surface. This type of fence is commonly used for property boundaries, gardens, or as a privacy screen in urban and suburban environments.
description: A simple, green and brown vertical slat fence panel with two horizontal rails and no decorative features, designed for functional boundary or privacy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing evenly spaced green vertical slats with a mostly flat top and no visible rails.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the slats and the depth of the supporting posts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two horizontal brown rails and the structural posts supporting the vertical slats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness of the posts and the layered arrangement of slats and rails.
